parsed.production_notes: The video exhibits clear signs of AI generation, notably the uncanny, overly smooth quality of the characters' faces and lip movements that fail to sync with the audio. Additionally, the static framing and perfect separation of subjects from the background suggest AI compositing.

characters.appearance: Older Indian male with a lean build and a dark complexion. He has deep facial wrinkles, prominent cheekbones, and white stubble. His eyes are dark and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: A patterned orange, brown, and white turban, a light-colored, slightly worn button-down shirt, and a brown checkered dhoti. He consistently carries a wooden-handled pickaxe over his right shoulder.
characters.demeanor: Initially distressed, then becomes highly enthusiastic, confident, and expressive.

characters.appearance: Young Indian male with a medium build and a medium complexion. He has short, neatly styled black hair and a clean-shaven face. His facial features are smooth and symmetrical.
characters.wardrobe: A crisp white lab coat worn over an olive-green button-down shirt and khaki trousers. A black stethoscope hangs consistently around his neck.

scenes.setting: Dirt path in a rural area, green fields in the background, daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: An older man and a younger man stand facing each other on a dirt path. The older man, Character A, is positioned on the left. He wears a turban, a light shirt, and a dhoti, and holds a pickaxe over his shoulder while touching his chest. The younger man, Character B, stands on the right. He wears a white lab coat and has a stethoscope around his neck. The background consists of green fields and a cloudy sky. The lighting is natural and bright.

scenes.visual_description: A wide shot establishes the scene on a dirt path in a rural setting. Character A, a farmer, stands on the left, holding a pickaxe and touching his chest in discomfort. Character B, a doctor, stands on the right, listening attentively. The background features lush green fields under a bright sky. Text overlays display the English translation of the farmer's spoken words.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: I am feeling pain in my chest when I breathe. Because of this, I am not able to sleep properly.
scenes.on_screen_text: I am feeling pain in my chest when I breathe Because of this I am not able to sleep properly

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man, Character B, stands in front of a vibrant green agricultural field. He is wearing a white lab coat over an olive-green shirt. A stethoscope hangs around his neck. He is looking directly forward with a slightly surprised expression. His right hand is raised in a subtle gesture. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting his features against the blurred green background.

scenes.visual_description: The camera cuts to a medium close-up of Character B, the doctor. He is positioned centrally against a vibrant green agricultural field. He looks directly at the camera with an expression of pleasant surprise. He gestures slightly with his right hand as he speaks. Tamil text overlays appear on the screen, translating his dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: உங்க இங்கிலீஷ் ரொம்ப சூப்பரா இருக்கே. ஏதாவது கோர்ஸ் படிச்சீங்களா? [Your English is very super. Did you study any course?]
scenes.on_screen_text: உங்க இங்கிலீஷ் ரொம்ப சூப்பரா இருக்கே ஏதாவது கோர்ஸ் படிச்சீங்களா (Your English is very super. Did you study any course?)

panels.panel_visual_description: An older man, Character A, is framed against a backdrop of a green field. He wears a patterned turban, a light-colored shirt, and a checkered dhoti. A wooden-handled pickaxe rests on his right shoulder. He is smiling broadly and looking directly ahead. His left hand is raised in an expressive gesture. The natural lighting illuminates his deeply wrinkled face.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shifts to a medium close-up of Character A, the farmer. He is framed against the same green field background. He smiles broadly and uses expressive hand gestures while talking. His pickaxe remains resting on his shoulder. Tamil text overlays are visible, providing the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: கோர்ஸ் படிக்க காசும் வேணும், படிப்பும் வேணும். நான் அஞ்சாவது தான் பாஸ். அப்புறம் எப்படி? [To study a course, money is needed, and education is needed. I only passed fifth grade. Then how?]
scenes.on_screen_text: கோர்ஸ் படிக்க காசும் வேணும் படிப்பும் வேணும் நான் அஞ்சாவது தான் பாஸ் அப்புறம் எப்படி (To study a course, money is needed, and education is needed. I only passed fifth grade. Then how?)

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B, a young man in a white lab coat, is positioned centrally against a green field. He has a stethoscope around his neck and wears an olive-green shirt underneath the coat. He looks forward with a questioning and curious expression. His arms are relaxed at his sides. The background is a soft, out-of-focus green, contrasting with his white coat.

scenes.visual_description: The camera returns to a medium close-up of Character B. He is still standing in front of the green field. His expression changes to one of curiosity and inquiry. He looks directly at the viewer while asking his question. Tamil text overlays continue to display his spoken words.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: அப்போ எப்படி இவ்வளவு சூப்பரா இங்கிலீஷ் பேசுறீங்க? [Then how are you speaking English so super?]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, an older man with a turban, stands in front of a green agricultural field. He is wearing a light shirt and a dhoti, with a pickaxe resting on his shoulder. He looks directly forward, speaking with an engaged expression. His left hand is raised, gesturing as he explains something. The lighting is bright, casting soft shadows on his face and clothing.

scenes.visual_description: A medium close-up shows Character A explaining the app. He stands against the green field, gesturing enthusiastically with his free hand. During his explanation, large graphic overlays appear on screen, including the text '30 Days' and an animated clock face. Tamil text overlays run continuously, translating his detailed explanation of the app's benefits.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: My Sivi சார். இதுல இருக்குற AI டீச்சர், என்ன மாதிரி ஒரு படிக்காத ஆள கூட இங்கிலீஷ் பேச வச்சிருச்சு. அதுவும் வெறும் 30 நாளுக்குள்ள. டெய்லி வெறும் 15-20 நிமிஷம் வீடியோ பாத்து பிராக்டிஸ் பண்ணாலே போதும். விளம்பர தொல்லை எதுவும் இல்லாம ரொம்ப ஈஸியா கத்துக்கலாம். [My Sivi sir. The AI teacher in this, made even an uneducated person like me speak English. That too in just 30 days. Daily just 15-20 minutes of watching videos and practicing is enough. Without any ad disturbance, we can learn very easily.]
scenes.on_screen_text: My Sivi சார் இதுல இருக்குற AI டீச்சர் என்ன மாதிரி ஒரு படிக்காத ஆள கூட இங்கிலீஷ் பேச வச்சிருச்சு அதுவும் வெறும் 30 நாளுக்குள்ள டெய்லி வெறும் 15-20 நிமிஷம் வீடியோ பாத்து பிராக்டிஸ் பண்ணாலே போதும் விளம்பர தொல்லை எதுவும் இல்லாம ரொம்ப ஈஸியா கத்துக்கலாம் (My Sivi sir. The AI teacher in this, made even an uneducated person like me speak English. That too in just 30 days. Daily just 15-20 minutes of watching videos and practicing is enough. Without any ad disturbance, we can learn very easily.) 30 Days 15-20 mins
